data.title: SPROUT PHARMACEUTICALS, MAKERS OF ADDYI (FLIBANSERIN), NAMED ONE OF THE 10 MOST INFLUENTIAL HEALTH AND LIFE SCIENCE COMPANIES OF 2026 BY TIME
data.description: After experiencing remarkable growth, increased prescriber adoption, and expanding payer coverage, Sprout Pharmaceuticals has solidified its position among the top companies in the biotech industry. TIME recently recognized Sprout Pharmaceuticals as one of the 10 organizations worldwide that are driving the future. This achievement comes following a record-setting performance and highlights the company's success in the field.

data.title: What's Going On With Yum China Stock On Wednesday?
data.description: Yum China Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: YUMC) saw an increase in its shares as it posted strong quarterly results highlighted by robust demand and growing digital engagement. The company's performance was supported by a surge in delivery services, expansion of its loyal customer base, and ongoing store development efforts, all contributing to bolstering confidence in its long-term strategy. Yum Brands stock is gaining positive momentum, driven by exceeding analyst expectations with first-quarter adjusted earnings per share reaching 87 cents, surpassing the consensus estimate of 86 cents. Quarterly sales stood at $3.271 billion, marking a 10% increase year over year, which exceeded the projected $3.235 billion. The company also witnessed a 4% growth in total system sales year over year, excluding the impact of foreign currency translation. The difference in timing of Chinese New Year and an extended April spring break influenced consumer behavior and impacted same-store sales growth.

data.title: Defense Giant General Dynamics Raises Profit Outlook
data.description: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE: GD) released their first-quarter 2026 financial results, showing a 10.3% year-over-year increase in revenue to $13.5 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $12.7 billion. Diluted EPS also saw a 12% rise from the previous year to $4.10, outperforming analyst expectations of $3.68. Operating earnings climbed 12% to $1.4 billion, with an operating margin of 10.5%. Net earnings shot up by 13.2% to $1.125 billion, and earnings before income tax grew by 14.1%. Net interest expense dropped from $89 million to $69 million since the previous year. In terms of segment performance, Aerospace revenue grew by 8.4% to $3.28 billion, with operating earnings up by 14.1% to $493 million, pushing the margin to 15.0% from 14.3%. Gulfstream aircraft deliveries increased to 38 units from 36 units, while orders surged to $3.84 billion from $2.36 billion. Marine Systems revenue jumped by 21.0% to $4.34 billion, with operating earnings rising by 26.4% to $316 million, and margins improving to 7.3% from 7.0%. Combat Systems'... data.title: Sport Clips Haircuts puts client experience at the top of its game plan during 2026 National Huddle
data.description: Sport Clips Haircuts, based in Louisville, Kentucky, announced its dedication to prioritizing the client experience at its 2026 National Huddle. The brand's new "Fans First" commitment emphasizes client satisfaction and aims to enhance their overall experience. This initiative aims to highlight the importance of customer service and focuses on putting the needs of clients front and center. The announcement was made on April 29, 2026, showcasing the brand's commitment to creating a positive and client-centric atmosphere.

data.title: New AI Tool Aims to Help Real Estate Agents Predict Their Next Listing
data.description: In Lakewood Ranch, Florida, on April 29, 2026, ProspectsPLUS!® is launching Listing Lens AI℠, a new predictive intelligence tool created by Jim Morton, the founder of the established real estate marketing platform. This tool aims to assist real estate agents in recognizing potential listing opportunities more effectively.

data.title: AerCap Holdings N.V. Announces Filing of Interim Financial Report for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: On April 29, 2026, AerCap Holdings N.V. (NYSE: AER) disclosed the submission of its interim financial report for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The report includes unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements and accompanying notes. This announcement came from AerCap, a leading company in the aviation industry, based in Dublin.

data.title: Re:Cognition Health Achieves Global Clinical Site Assessment Recertification at its U.S. Clinics
data.description: In Fairfax, Virginia on April 29, 2026, Re:Cognition Health, a renowned company specializing in innovative Alzheimer's Disease treatments, has confirmed the successful renewal of its Global Clinical Site Assessment (GCSA) Site Certification. This recognition, bestowed by the International Accrediting organization, signifies the company's continued dedication to excellence in conducting clinical trials worldwide.

data.title: Bardstown Bourbon Company Turns Any Bottle into a Personalized Gifting Experience
data.description: In Bardstown, Kentucky, Bardstown Bourbon has implemented NFC gift tags for consumers to personalize gifts with custom messages, photos, or videos. This technology enables recipients to access the attached content directly with the gift, enhancing the gifting experience.

data.title: Alexander’s Declares Quarterly $4.50 Dividend on Common Shares
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Alexander’s, Inc. (NYSE: ALX) made public its latest declaration regarding dividends. The company's Board of Directors confirmed a standard quarterly dividend amounting to $4.50 per share. This dividend is scheduled for payment on May 29, 2026, to shareholders recorded on May 11, 2026.
